help.title: Complete Zareoon guide
help.subtitle: How to use the site as a buyer, seller, or service provider — on mobile and desktop

buyer.title: Buyer guide
buyer.intro: As a buyer you can search products and services, submit need requests, manage your cart, and track orders.

browse.title: Search and browse
browse.body: Use the home search box or map to find products or services. Open cards for details and contact info. Deals are direct between you and the other party.

request.title: Submit a need request
request.body: If you are not sure whom to buy from, use Submit request in the buyer dashboard. Track status under My requests.

cart.title: Cart
cart.body: Collect selected products in the cart and finalize the order. Coordinate payment and delivery with the seller.

orders.title: My orders
orders.body: Open My orders in the buyer dashboard to follow registered orders.

messages.title: Messages and contact
messages.body: Contact the seller or provider from their public page. Final terms and risk stay with the parties.

desktop.title: Buying on desktop
desktop.body: Use the header search and categories. Open the user icon → My Zareoon and switch to the buyer role in the sidebar. Cart is in the header.

mobile.title: Buying on mobile
mobile.body: Use the bottom bar for home, search, and dashboard. In the mobile dashboard, pick the Buyer tab for requests, orders, and cart shortcuts.

seller.title: Seller guide
seller.intro: Create a shop to get a business page and product list. Manage customer orders and related need requests from the seller dashboard.

join.title: Create a shop
join.body: From My business page or the seller dashboard, open Create shop. Set your public page name, contact details, and optionally hours and location.

products.title: Products and inventory
products.body: Add items with price, images, and details from My products or New inventory. Accurate listings help buyers reach you.

orders.title: Customer orders
orders.body: Review incoming orders in the seller area and coordinate delivery and payment directly.

incoming.title: Related need requests
incoming.body: See buyer requests related to your products and respond with offers.

page.title: Your shop page
page.body: Your public URL looks like zareoon.ir/your-page. My business page in the header menu opens it. Edit shop settings from the seller dashboard.

desktop.title: Selling on desktop
desktop.body: User icon → My Zareoon, then switch the sidebar to Seller for products, inventory, orders, and shop page.

mobile.title: Selling on mobile
mobile.body: Open the Seller tab in the mobile dashboard. If you have no shop yet, use Create shop; afterwards product and order shortcuts appear.

provider.title: Service provider guide
provider.intro: Offer trade services (customs, logistics, inspection, finance, and more) with a business page and respond to related requests.

join.title: Join as a provider
join.body: Start trade-services registration from My business page or the services dashboard. Pick a category, fill company or professional info, and set your page address. After admin review, your page goes live.

page.title: My services page
page.body: Once approved, clients see your public page. Edit details from the services dashboard; changes may need another review.

orders.title: Orders and coordination
orders.body: Track service-related orders or requests and coordinate directly with the client.

incoming.title: Needs for my services
incoming.body: View applicant requests in your field and reply or contact them.

desktop.title: Services on desktop
desktop.body: In the dashboard, choose the Service provider persona above the sidebar for your page, registration, and incoming needs.

mobile.title: Services on mobile
mobile.body: Open the Provider tab. If you are not a member yet, tap Create services; afterwards page and request shortcuts appear.

account.title: Profile, security, and business page
account.intro: Your account underpins every role. Keep your profile accurate for easier contact and trust.

profile.title: Edit personal profile
profile.body: Use Edit personal profile from the user menu or Dashboard → Account to update name, contact, and address details.

security.title: Sign-in and security
security.body: Use a strong password and verify email when possible. Sign out on shared devices.

roles.title: Multiple roles
roles.body: You can be buyer, seller, and provider at once. Switch roles in the dashboard; the sidebar follows the active role.

dedicated.title: My business page
dedicated.body: If you already have a shop or services page, this opens your public page. Otherwise you see an intro that explains how to create a shop or services page.

devices.title: Mobile vs desktop
devices.intro: The same features exist on both; navigation differs slightly.

desktopNav.title: Desktop
desktopNav.body: Full header with search, language, and user icon. User menu: My Zareoon, Edit personal profile, My business page, Guide, Log out. Dashboard uses a sidebar and role switcher.

mobileNav.title: Mobile
mobileNav.body: Bottom bar for quick moves. Mobile dashboard uses Buyer / Seller / Provider tabs with shortcuts. Open the side menu from the menu icon.

tips.title: Practical tips
tips.body: If an option is missing, switch role or create a shop/services page first. You can also open the in-dashboard guide for panel sections.

homepageDisclaimer.title: Direct connection between sellers and buyers
homepageDisclaimer.body: Zareoon is only a platform for direct contact among buyers, sellers, and service providers. Deal terms, quality, price, payment, and delivery are set by the parties; Zareoon bears no responsibility for transactions.
